channel.title: 3 on DANIELLE COSME
channel.description: Recent content in 3 on DANIELLE COSME

item.title: Comparing two neurocognitive models of self-control during dietary decisions
item.description:
Citation:
Cosme, D., Ludwig, R. M., & Berkman, E. T. Comparing two neurocognitive models of self-control during dietary decisions. (under review)

item.title: If you’re happy and you know it: Neural correlates of self-evaluated psychological health and well-being
item.description:
Citation:
Cosme, D., Mobasser, A., Ross, G. & Pfeifer, J. H. If you’re happy and you know it: Neural correlates of self-evaluated psychological health and well-being. (submitted)

item.title: Multivariate neural signatures for health neuroscience: Assessing spontaneous regulation during food choice
item.description:
Citation:
Cosme, D., Zeithamova, D., Stice E., & Berkman E. T. Multivariate neural signatures for health neuroscience: Assessing spontaneous regulation during food choice. (under review)
